# Key Findings (auto-generated)

Factual rollup of the current feature dataset. Interpretation lives in the final report.

## Overview
- Posts: 15,997 across 2 platforms (youtube: 14,122, instagram: 1,875).
- Content date range: 2019-02-08 to 2026-07-05.

## Sentiment by platform (English)
- instagram: positive 85.6%, neutral 7.6%, negative 6.8%.
- youtube: positive 65.6%, neutral 20.7%, negative 13.7%.

## Engagement vs sentiment
- Avg engagement percentile by sentiment: negative 0.493, neutral 0.504, positive 0.507 (spread 0.014).
- Relationship is essentially flat (sentiment does not predict engagement).

## Dominant topics (by volume)
- T0: business, time, help, real - 10,736 posts.
- T3: understand, easy, easy understand, simple - 704 posts.
- T5: free, free praise, praise, paid - 558 posts.
- T1: course, completed, complete, interested - 483 posts.
- T2: clear, wish, understandable, clear understandable - 421 posts.

## Emerging vs declining topics (recent vs earlier in window)
- Rising: T0: business, time, help, real (+8.68 pts).
- Rising: T4: chat, gpt, chat gpt, used (+0.56 pts).
- Rising: T5: free, free praise, praise, paid (-0.68 pts).
- Declining: T3: understand, easy, easy understand, simple (-2.65 pts).
- Declining: T2: clear, wish, understandable, clear understandable (-3.92 pts).

## Top keywords (by volume)
- ChatGPT - 2,694 posts.
- Automation - 1,967 posts.
- AI Agents - 1,637 posts.
- Startup - 1,519 posts.
- Digital Marketing - 1,465 posts.

## Models
- Production sentiment model: vader (deploy-domain macro-F1 0.6493).
- Topic model: NMF, k=6, UMass coherence -1.1685 (more coherent than LDA).
